title: Aureline operational evidence-handoff bundle
description: Boundary schema for the evidence_handoff_bundle_record frozen in docs/ops/incident_workspace_contract.md. One bundle is an immutable snapshot exported from an incident workspace for postmortem / review reading, browser / console handoff, or last-synced offline view consumption. The bundle records the source incident_workspace_id, the bundle_kind (postmortem / review / browser-handoff / console-handoff / last_synced_offline_view), the immutable_snapshot_at timestamp, an opaque integrity_hash that pins the snapshot's content, the preserved target context (execution-context / deployment-profile / exact-build identity), and the closed list of evidence-item, runbook-packet, action-ledger-entry, and signal-slice refs the bundle pinned at snapshot time. The bundle is frozen-no-post-hoc-rewrite by default: corrections land as a new bundle that supersedes the prior one by stable id; the prior bundle remains visible in the chronology and is never deleted, backdated, or rewritten in place. Browser / console handoffs travel through this bundle so the exit transition is attributable rather than a hidden alternate control plane. The bundle never carries raw provider URLs, raw provider payloads, raw stdout / stderr, raw stack frames, raw absolute paths, raw command lines, raw response bodies, raw alert payloads, raw operator identity strings, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw browser-cookie material, or raw secret material; rows carry opaque ids, typed vocabulary, redaction-aware reviewable labels (<= 1024 graphemes), and freshness / target-context / handoff tokens only. Composes with (and does not replace) ADR-0007 (secret-broker handle / raw-secret-forbidden boundary), ADR-0010 (browser-handoff and approval-ticket envelope), ADR-0018 (workspace-trust state), schemas/runtime/execution_context.schema.json (target identity / sandbox posture / policy epoch), schemas/runtime/browser_runtime_session.schema.json (browser-runtime session and preview-route record), schemas/integration/browser_handoff_packet.schema.json (browser-handoff packet envelope), schemas/support/support_bundle.schema.json (support / export bundle the evidence-handoff bundle may compose with by reference), schemas/security/incident_workspace_packet.schema.json (security-side private-triage packet the bundle composes with by reference), and schemas/ops/runbook_packet.schema.json (runbook-packet / action-ledger entry the bundle pins by reference). The eventual ops crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every postmortem / review reader, support / export reader, AI-tool review surface, browser-handoff exit, console-handoff exit, last-synced offline view reader, and admin / policy review reads. Adding a new record_kind, bundle_kind_class, integrity_class, handoff_class, retention_posture_class, denial_reason, or audit_event_id is additive-minor and bumps evidence_handoff_bundle_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

evidence_handoff_bundle_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the evidence-handoff-bundle vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator. Always evidence_handoff_bundle_record for bundles conforming to this schema.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests, journal entries, support bundles, postmortem / review bundles, and admin reconciliation surfaces. Raw provider URLs, raw provider payloads, raw absolute paths, raw command lines, raw response bodies, raw alert payloads, raw operator identity strings, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw browser-cookie material, and raw secret material never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary safe for postmortem / review, support / export, browser / console handoff exit, last-synced offline view, and admin reconciliation surfaces; never carries the raw payload.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show in preview, postmortem / review, and export review surfaces. Never carries the raw payload.

integrity_hash.description: Opaque content hash pinning the bundle's snapshotted content at immutable_snapshot_at. Raw payload bytes never appear; only the opaque hash crosses this boundary.

redaction_class.description: Declared redaction class re-exported from ADR-0010 / ADR-0007. Raw provider payloads, raw stack frames, raw stdout / stderr, raw absolute paths, raw command lines, raw response bodies, raw alert payloads, raw operator identity strings, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw browser-cookie material, and raw secret material never cross this boundary regardless of class. private_triage_only is admissible only when the bundle is bound to a security-side incident_workspace_packet record.

trust_posture.description: ADR-0018 / ADR-0009 workspace-trust state the bundle was admitted under.

policy_context.description: Policy-context envelope re-exported from ADR-0008 / ADR-0009 / ADR-0018.

bundle_kind_class.description: Frozen bundle-kind vocabulary. browser_console_handoff_attributable_exit / console_handoff_attributable_exit make a browser or console handoff attributable rather than a hidden alternate control plane: the exit travels through this bundle and is recorded in the chronology. last_synced_offline_view_read_only is the offline / mirrored read-only projection. ai_tool_proposed_bundle_pending_review forbids leaving pending review state. imported_evidence_replay_bundle_no_live_target forbids any live-target attach.

integrity_class.description: Frozen integrity-class vocabulary. frozen_no_post_hoc_rewrite is the default: prior bundles are never deleted, backdated, or rewritten in place. superseded_by_new_bundle requires a non-null superseded_by_bundle_id_ref; the prior bundle remains visible in the chronology. integrity_unverifiable_user_review_required is the safe-default.

handoff_destination_class.description: Frozen handoff-destination vocabulary. no_handoff_local_review_only is admissible only on postmortem_bundle_for_review / internal_review_bundle_pre_publication / last_synced_offline_view_read_only / imported_evidence_replay_bundle_no_live_target. browser / console handoff bundles MUST resolve to system_browser_review_handoff / device_code_review_handoff / console_attached_session_handoff.

retention_posture_class.description: Frozen retention-posture vocabulary. Names how long the bundle is held and where it is admissible to read from. retention_posture_unknown_requires_review is the safe-default that strips export-routing admissibility.

rewrite_admissibility_class.description: Frozen rewrite-admissibility vocabulary. The default is no_post_hoc_rewrite_admitted; corrections MUST land as a new bundle that supersedes the prior one. ai_tool_proposed_correction_pending_review forbids leaving pending review state.

evidence_origin_class.description: Frozen evidence-origin vocabulary. Names where the snapshotted evidence came from at immutable_snapshot_at.

execution_context_id_ref.description: Opaque ref into schemas/runtime/execution_context.schema.json. Pinned at immutable_snapshot_at so a postmortem / review reader resolves the same target identity the responder saw.

exact_build_identity_refs.description: Opaque refs into schemas/build/exact_build_identity.schema.json. Pinned at immutable_snapshot_at.

preserved_target_context.description: Preserved target-context envelope. The bundle pins the execution-context / deployment-profile / exact-build identity the responder observed at immutable_snapshot_at; postmortem / review readers resolve the same target context the responder saw.

evidence_item_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the evidence item the bundle pinned at snapshot time. Stable across redaction-pass reruns.

evidence_item_ref.description: One evidence-item ref pinned by the bundle. Raw bodies never cross this boundary; the bundle pins the opaque ref and the typed origin class only.

source_incident_workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the incident_workspace_record the bundle was exported from. Stable across the bundle's life; never rewritten.

immutable_snapshot_at.description: Wall-clock at which the bundle's content was frozen. Never rewritten; corrections land as a new bundle.

superseded_by_bundle_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bundle that supersedes this one. Non-null when integrity_class is superseded_by_new_bundle; null otherwise. The prior bundle remains visible in the chronology.

supersedes_bundle_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the prior bundle this bundle supersedes. Non-null only when this bundle was authored as a correction to a prior bundle.

evidence_item_refs.description: Closed list of evidence items the bundle pinned at snapshot time. Never rewritten in place; corrections land as a new bundle.

included_runbook_packet_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to runbook_packet_record ids the bundle pinned at snapshot time. Never rewritten in place.

included_action_ledger_entry_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to action_ledger_entry_record ids the bundle pinned at snapshot time. Never rewritten in place.

included_signal_slice_id_refs.description: Opaque refs to signal_slice ids the bundle pinned at snapshot time. Never rewritten in place.

linked_support_bundle_refs.description: Opaque refs to schemas/support/support_bundle.schema.json. The bundle composes with the support / export bundle by reference rather than re-embedding raw payloads.

linked_security_incident_packet_refs.description: Opaque refs to schemas/security/incident_workspace_packet.schema.json (private-triage) when the operational incident also opened a security triage.

linked_emergency_action_refs.description: Opaque refs to schemas/security/emergency_action_record.schema.json. The bundle pins the emergency-action ref the action-ledger invoked, not a copy of the action body.

linked_browser_handoff_packet_refs.description: Opaque refs to schemas/integration/browser_handoff_packet.schema.json. Non-empty when bundle_kind_class is browser_console_handoff_attributable_exit.

linked_console_handoff_session_refs.description: Opaque refs to console-handoff sessions. Non-empty when bundle_kind_class is console_handoff_attributable_exit.

linked_postmortem_review_refs.description: Opaque refs to postmortem / review records the bundle feeds. Empty when bundle_kind_class is browser_console_handoff_attributable_exit / console_handoff_attributable_exit / last_synced_offline_view_read_only.

allOf.description: integrity_class = superseded_by_new_bundle MUST cite a non-null superseded_by_bundle_id_ref.

bundle_kind_class = browser_console_handoff_attributable_exit MUST cite a non-empty linked_browser_handoff_packet_refs and resolve handoff_destination_class to system_browser_review_handoff or device_code_review_handoff.
bundle_kind_class = console_handoff_attributable_exit MUST cite a non-empty linked_console_handoff_session_refs and resolve handoff_destination_class to console_attached_session_handoff.
bundle_kind_class = ai_tool_proposed_bundle_pending_review forbids leaving pending review and forbids handoff to live destinations.

evidence_handoff_bundle_record.description: One evidence-handoff bundle. Carries the immutable snapshot every postmortem / review, browser / console handoff exit, last-synced offline view, and admin reconciliation reader resolves against. Frozen-no-post-hoc-rewrite by default; corrections supersede via a new bundle, never by editing the prior one.
